Sticky header hidden by CSS without aria‑hidden | Testimonials carousel does not set aria‑hidden on non‑active slides (initial state) | Testimonials carousel fails to clear aria‑hidden on the previously active slide when navigating | Testimonials carousel does not announce slide changes via a dedicated live region for each navigation action | Product‑filter component does not provide an ARIA live announcement when the result count changes | Product‑filter component does not announce when the empty‑state message appears or disappears | Product‑filter component does not announce pagination changes (e.g., “Page 2 of 5”) | Mobile‑navigation toggle button may lack a valid `aria-controls` reference because the drawer element has no `id` attribute | Dropdown‑menu triggers may miss `aria-controls` when the associated panel lacks an `id` attribute | FAQ accordion toggle button does not set `aria-pressed` to reflect its expanded/collapsed state | Search‑suggestion list items are focusable via `tabindex="-1"` but the list container lacks an appropriate `role="listbox"` and `aria‑activedescendant` management for keyboard navigation | Product‑filter view‑mode toggle buttons do not have an explicit `role="button"` or `aria-pressed` when they are implemented as plain `<button>` elements with only a class change | The “Scroll‑to‑Top” button is hidden with the `hidden` attribute but does not have an associated `aria-label` when it becomes visible, making its purpose unclear to screen readers.

column1: # FALSE NEGATIVE DETAIL  (real issues the model failed to detect)
# CONCEPT MISS HEATMAP  (how many models missed each expected issue — higher = harder to detect)
# COMPLEXITY REGRESSION  (F1 degradation across low / medium / high fixtures)
# STREAMING QUALITY  (F1 at partial token percentages — plateau = earliest % reaching 90% of final F1)
# PARETO FRONTIER  (models where no competitor has both better F1 and lower latency)
# ADVERSARIAL VULNERABILITY  (detection rate per violation type on adversarial fixtures)
